merge_viewer.parse_errors_desc: The following configuration files could not be parsed. Please fix these errors to ensure proper configuration merging.

featured.journey_description: Your coding journey with Claude Code

statusbar.custom_script_desc: Use a script to generate status bar content
statusbar.script_desc: Script receives JSON context via stdin. First line of stdout becomes the status bar.

profile_dialog.title: Application Settings
profile_dialog.subtitle: Configure app-level preferences
profile_dialog.terminal_mode_desc: Set the default app used when opening project terminals
profile_dialog.terminal_app_desc: Choose a terminal app instead of typing a path manually
profile_dialog.launch_draft_retention_desc: Auto-clean temporary launch draft files older than this duration
profile_dialog.shorten_paths_desc: Show home directory as ~ in project paths

settings.title: Settings
settings.global_subtitle: Manage all your configurations in one place
settings.model_strategy_desc: Control the default model, reasoning effort, and custom model routing.
settings.effort_level_desc: Set the default effort level for Claude Code; Auto follows Claude's default policy.
settings.available_models_desc: Limit the picker to approved model entries while still allowing a chosen default.
settings.model_overrides_desc: Map picker aliases to concrete provider model IDs for custom routing.
settings.memory_plans_desc: Control automatic memory storage, saved plans, and transcript cleanup.
settings.auto_memory_directory_desc: Directory where Claude Code writes automatic memory notes.
settings.auto_memory_directory_project_desc: autoMemoryDirectory is not accepted in project settings; configure it at user or managed scope.
settings.plans_directory_desc: Directory used to save generated plan artifacts.
settings.show_turn_duration_desc: Show per-turn duration after each response
settings.response_language_desc: Preferred response language for Claude (leave empty for default)
settings.auto_updates_channel_desc: Choose latest releases or the more stable channel
settings.terminal_progress_bar_desc: Show progress bars in supported terminals
settings.experience_desc: Adjust organization messaging, feedback sampling, and spinner copy.
settings.feedback_survey_rate_desc: Chance from 0 to 1 that the post-session survey is shown.
settings.company_announcements_desc: Inject organization-specific guidance into the Claude Code UI.
settings.spinner_tips_override_desc: Override loading tips with a curated custom list.
settings.spinner_tips_exclude_default_desc: Show only your custom spinner tips instead of merging with the built-in list.
settings.teammate_mode_desc: Choose how agent teammates are displayed
settings.shared_task_list_id_desc: Writes env var CLAUDE_CODE_TASK_LIST_ID; empty value removes it
settings.extra_known_marketplaces_desc: Configure extraKnownMarketplaces (named marketplaces with nested source)
settings.commit_attribution_desc: How Claude is credited in commits
settings.managed_controls_desc: Enterprise policy switches that only take effect in managed scope.
settings.managed_scope_only_desc: This control can only be edited from managed settings.
settings.allow_managed_permission_rules_only_desc: Require permission rules to come exclusively from managed settings.
settings.allow_managed_mcp_servers_only_desc: Restrict MCP server definitions to managed settings only.
settings.channels_enabled_desc: Allow Claude Code channels to be used under managed policy.
settings.no_hooks_hint: Hooks allow you to run commands in response to events
settings.allow_managed_hooks_only_desc: Only allow hooks that are defined in managed settings.
settings.session_end_timeout_desc: Writes env.CLAUDE_CODE_SESSIONEND_HOOKS_TIMEOUT_MS for the total SessionEnd hook budget.
settings.allowed_http_hook_urls_desc: Explicit allowlist for outbound HTTP hook targets.
settings.no_allowed_http_hook_urls: No HTTP hook URL allowlist entries
settings.http_hook_allowed_env_vars_desc: Environment variables that HTTP hooks are allowed to receive.
settings.no_http_hook_allowed_env_vars: No HTTP hook env vars configured
settings.disable_all_hooks_desc: Temporarily stop all hooks from running.
settings.hooks_advanced_settings_desc: Manage hook policies, timeouts, and HTTP allowlists.

llm.drag_hint: Drag the handle to reorder providers.

llm.import_exists: This supplier configuration has already been imported.
llm.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
llm.no_providers: No providers saved. Click + to add one.
llm.no_providers_hint: Add a provider to get started

providers.native_desc: Direct Anthropic API with your API key
providers.qiniu_desc: Use Qiniu Cloud AI gateway for Anthropic API
providers.siliconflow_desc: Use SiliconCloud API for Claude Code with various models
providers.univibe_desc: UniVibe proxy service, supports Claude Code / Codex / Cursor
providers.zenmux_desc: Route via ZenMux to unlock more model options

env.title: Environment
env.subtitle: Manage Claude Code environment variables with grouped guidance and quick presets
env.corporate_proxy_desc: Add HTTP_PROXY / HTTPS_PROXY for firewalled networks
env.no_env_hint: Add environment variables to configure Claude Code
env.quick_add_desc: Choose a recommended variable or enter a custom key, then stage the value before saving.
env.groups_panel_desc: Choose a capability domain first, then configure variables within that slice.
env.variables_panel_desc: This second-level menu lists the keys in the current group.
env.select_variable_hint: Choose a group on the left, then pick a key from the secondary menu to configure its value.
env.empty_group_hint: Try another keyword or switch to a different group.
env.create_custom_desc: Enter a custom key, or choose a recommended variable and fill its parameters before saving.
env.key_locked_hint: This key is selected from the secondary menu. Only its value is edited here.
env.show_more_group_items: Show {{count}} more variables in this group
env.no_group_matches: No environment variables match this category
env.no_group_matches_hint: Try another keyword or switch back to all groups.
env.custom_item_desc: Custom variable not in the built-in catalog

all.title: All groups
all.desc: Browse recommended variables by capability and focus on the area you are configuring.

auth.title: Access & Providers
auth.desc: Authentication, provider switching, gateway endpoints, and cloud credentials.

models.title: Models & Reasoning
models.desc: Default models, effort level, custom model options, and thinking budgets.

runtime.title: Runtime Behavior
runtime.desc: Session behavior, tasks, shell integration, memory, and interaction flow.

network.title: Network & Proxy
network.desc: Proxy routing, host resolution, custom headers, and network endpoints.

mcp.title: MCP & Tools
mcp.desc: MCP connectivity, tool search, OAuth callback settings, and output limits.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.desc: Plugin auto-updates, seed directories, and packaged plugin workflows.

privacy.title: Privacy & Telemetry
privacy.desc: Visibility controls, telemetry, demo mode, and nonessential traffic.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.desc: Low-level budgets, ripgrep behavior, and expert-only overrides.

custom.title: Custom
custom.desc: Variables not yet mapped into the built-in grouped catalog.

terminal.cli_not_found_detail: Install {{kind}} and ensure your shell PATH includes it.
terminal.missing_credentials_detail: Set ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or enable OAuth (CLAUDE_CODE_USE_OAUTH=1). In CN, configure a proxy in LLM Providers.
terminal.unable_read_settings_detail: Check ~/.claude/settings.json and ensure Claude Code Impact has access to it.

terminal.command_exited_detail: The CLI process ended before producing output. Check login, proxy, or network settings.
